subcodes.first_line: O My God, My God! All praise be unto Thee for having informed Thy servants and revealed unto them aforetime that which later came to pass [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی لک الحمد بما اخبرت عبادک و اظهرت لهم من قبل ما ظهر من بعد اذ کان
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
